tasks.name: Button Relocation
tasks.description: Move the primary action button from left to right side of the form
tasks.prompt: Find the main submit/action button in the component and move it to the right side of its container. Use flexbox justify-end or equivalent.

tasks.name: Style Modification
tasks.description: Change primary button color from default to blue (bg-blue-600)
tasks.prompt: Locate the primary button component and change its background color to blue (bg-blue-600 or equivalent). Keep all other functionality intact.

tasks.name: Loading State Addition
tasks.description: Add isLoading prop to button component with disabled state and spinner
tasks.prompt: Add an isLoading prop to the main button component. When true, show a loading spinner and disable the button. Use existing loading/spinner components if available.

tasks.name: Component Extraction
tasks.description: Extract inline header JSX into separate Header component
tasks.prompt: Find a component with inline header JSX (title, subtitle, actions). Extract this into a separate Header component with appropriate props.

tasks.name: Form Validation
tasks.description: Add email validation to input field with error message display
tasks.prompt: Add email format validation to an email input field. Show red error message below input when invalid. Use useState for validation state.
